message:
feat(test): add proptest_error_renderer.rs with 35 property-based tests

Covers error_renderer.rs (814 lines, non-feature-gated, had no proptest file):
- FT-XXXX format invariants (prefix, digit suffix, determinism)
- JSON rendering (valid JSON, ok:false, code/error/title/description fields)
- Plain rendering (error code, ft why hint, Error: header, non-empty)
- Catalog coverage (all codes have entries, category roundtrip)
- Category range validation (Wezterm 1000-1999, Storage 2000-2999, etc.)
- Convenience function equivalence (render_error, get_code_for_error)
- Output length bounds (<10KB for both formats)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
